agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 201 (Ralph / CIO co-piloted, V0.27.11 sprint) -- Sprint 37 V0.27.11 COMPLETE in-session per CIO directive 'use your plan skills and RCA each one and then fix each one'. RCA finding worth carrying forward: Spool's I-037 hypothesis (US-330 retry-fallback default=1) was EMPIRICALLY WRONG -- US-330's diff is a pure retry wrapper, returns [] on all-fail -> NULL not 1. Actual root cause: US-308's (2026-05-09) ladder-probe pattern matching the orchestrator INTENT marker emitted BEFORE the failing subprocess.run. US-330's retry code stays untouched. Shipped: US-341 (polkit rule at deploy/polkit-rules/50-eclipse-obd-poweroff.rules + deploy-pi.sh step_install_polkit_poweroff + Strategy G _executeShutdown hardening: SHUTDOWN_SUCCESS_MARKER on returncode==0, ERROR+raise ShutdownHandlerError on failure), US-342 (LADDER_GRACEFUL_GREP_PATTERN repointed at success marker + runtime drift-gate contract test pinning handler-emit and probe-pattern), US-343 (read-only audit_historical_drain_canary.py + findings template). Test status: tests/pi/ 1715 tests green; ruff clean; sprint_lint 0 errors / 6 informational warnings (long titles + acceptance counts > sizing caps); bash -n + deploy-pi.sh --dry-run OK. sprint.json passes=true on all 3 stories with populated feedback blocks. Side artifacts (not in sprint scope): docs/design-prompts/2026-05-15-pi-runtime-workflow-schematic.md (CIO whiteboard discussion -> indie design prompt for fresh-session evaluation, NOT actioned here); audit script DEFAULT_PI_HOST flipped IP->hostname after CIO question on DNS resolution; 2x PM inbox notes filed (sprint-deploy handoff + V0.28+ hostname-resolution candidate). Changes UNSTAGED -- awaiting PM /sprint-deploy-pm. Drain 23 IRL gate post-deploy is the chain-merge unblocker.
